label: device_list_channel_count
summary: device list shows hardware channel capacity (64) instead of active channel count (2) for AD4D

history.note: device.py:185 uses device.tx_count (from 0x1000 opcode, reports board capacity) instead of len(device.tx_channels) (from 0x2000 parser, reports active channels). AD4D has a 64-channel board but only 2 TX channels are active.
Fixed in device.py:185 — use len(device.tx_channels) instead of device.tx_count, with fallback to tx_count when channels aren't populated.
